name: chart-area-stacked
visual_summary: A responsive stacked-area chart that visualizes multiple data series stacked on top of each other, ideal for displaying quantitative changes over time or across categories. Typically used in data-driven applications to provide insights into trends and correlations. Perfect for use in reporting, analytics, or business intelligence dashboards.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-area-stacked
Description: A responsive stacked-area chart that visualizes multiple data series stacked on top of each other, ideal for displaying quantitative changes over time or across categories. Typically used in data-driven applications to provide insights into trends and correlations. Perfect for use in reporting, analytics, or business intelligence dashboards.
Style: high contrast, gradient, legend
Interactions: hover, animated, responsive
Tags: chart, stacked, area, data visualization, reporting, analytics

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
